channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Best Fruits to Eat During Cancer Treatment
item.description: Fruits can support nutrition during cancer care. Learn which options may ease treatment side effects and offer potential protective benefits.

item.title: Ways to Manage Blue Light for Better Sleep

item.title: How to 'green' operating rooms: New guideline advises reduce, reuse, recycle, and rethink

item.title: About 60% Adults Qualify for Heart, Renal, or Metabolic Meds
item.description: Nearly 60% of US adults qualify for at least one novel cardiovascular, kidney, or metabolic drug — most often a GLP-1 receptor agonist — with many eli...

item.title: Pancreatic and ‘Skinny Fat’ Linked to Brain Risks
item.description: The effect of body fat on brain health may depend not only on the amount of fat an individual has but also on where that fat is stored. Medscape Medic...

item.title: Do Ultraprocessed Foods Impact Survival After Cancer?
item.description: New research links consumption of ultraprocessed foods to earlier death in cancer survivors — but caveats abound. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Decades of drinking reshape gene expression in key human brain regions, study shows

item.title: How associations between historical redlining and breast cancer survival changed over time

item.title: First-Line H pylori Regimens: Which Is Most Cost-Effective?

item.title: Brief, intensive exercise may help patients with panic disorder more than standard care
item.description: Panic attacks are sudden bouts of intense fear without an obvious cause. An estimated 10% of people experience at least one panic attack in their life...
